name: AR - مسلسل طوارئ
plot: في إطار درامي، تدور أحداث المسلسل حول الزوجين الطبيبين مهيمن وآيات، حيث تنهار علاقتهما بسبب الأنانية والاضطراب العاطفي، وتصل إلى ذروتها عندما تصر آيات على الطلاق وفض الشراكة بينهما لاكتشافها تورط مهيمن في عمليات فساد وأدوية منتهية الصلاحية.
cast: Mohammad Hashim, Zuhur Alaa, Saad Mohsen, Ahmed Touma Al-Tamimi, Ali Najm, Zinah Al Dulaimi, Raghad Khatoun, Raghad Khatun

name: DE - Spy Kids - Auf wichtiger Mission (2018)
plot: Die Geschwister und geheimen Spione Juni und Carmen Cortez müssen die große Aufgabe übernehmen, sich gegen die bösartige S.W.A.M.P-Organisation und deren Anführer Golden Brain zu stellen.
cast: Caitlyn Bairstow, Mira Sorvino, Travis Turner, Patton Oswalt

name: EN - Young Sherlock (2026) (GB)
plot: Sherlock Holmes is a disgraced young man, raw and unfiltered, when he finds himself wrapped up in a murder case that threatens his liberty. His first ever case unravels a globe-trotting conspiracy that changes his life forever.
cast: Hero Fiennes Tiffin, Dónal Finn, Zine Tseng, Joseph Fiennes, Natascha McElhone, Max Irons, Colin Firth

name: EN - Scammed: Getting Even (2025) (US)
plot: Follow viral YouTubers Ashton Bingham and Art Kulik as they track down, confront, and expose real-life scammers around the globe, focusing on various modern-day frauds, including romance scams, crypto cons, and refund scams, aiming to provide victims with accountability and closure.

name: EN - The Bus Driver: Britain’s Cocaine King (2025) (GB)
plot: Bus-driver-turned-Cocaine-King. Jesus Ruiz Henao flooded '90s Britain with cocaine, building a billion-pound empire. It took police five years to convict him, in what would become the largest surveillance operation of its kind.
